历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 46222 → 47147 → 43368 → 42231 → 58906. In 2024, it dropped to 42231, the lowest in recent years, but in 2025 it significantly shifted back to 58906, a backward movement of about 16675 places in one year, showing drastic fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 58906. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 868 in 2021, 1041 in 2022, 2599 in 2023, 1979 in 2024, and 2002 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 2037, a slight expansion of 35 students (+1.75%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been steadily rising in recent years, from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, reflecting a steady enhancement of comprehensive strength. Yanbian University has no significant negative or positive events in reputation documents, with stable public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 79th (rated 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity of 292222, indicating medium-low short video exposure and no abnormal increase in application attention. There are no records of historical admission anomalies for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no A- or above disciplines. Its advantageous disciplines are mainly in Korean language, foreign language and literature, and other characteristic fields, placing its overall disciplinary competitiveness in the mid-range among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's science enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.). In 2026, the total number of provincial examinees is 110868, a slight decrease of about 624 from 111492 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 79970, slightly down from 80421 in 2025, indicating a basically stable candidate pool. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, and is a provincial university with a very high proportion of provincial enrollment (in 2025, 2002 physics category students account for the majority of the university's national enrollment). Provincial candidates' willingness to apply is stable, with no significant cross-provincial regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1.75%), the slight decrease in provincial examinees, and the steady improvement in university ranking with stable reputation and popularity, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025 but with limited magnitude. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 59604, with a range of 59104–60104.
